title.en: [Highlight] Shohei Ohtani makes it homers in back-to-back games!
title.ja: 大谷翔平、2試合連続ホームラン！

summaryJa: PNC パークでの対パイレーツ最終戦、大谷が前日に続いてまたしてもアーチを描いた。打球は詰まったような当たりに見えて、現地ニキたちは「これがホームラン!?」と騒然。バットに置いたような一振りで運ぶ怪物っぷりに「ホームランってデカいポテンヒットだろ」「OPSが防御率を超えにいってる」とお祭り騒ぎ。一方、試合途中で左ヒザの炎症で交代という不穏な一報も。バット好調・登板後の休養・3-0からのフルスイングまで、ドジャースニキの実況をまとめた。

media.caption: 大谷翔平、2試合連続となる一発（対パイレーツ・PNCパーク）

comments.author: Mew_111
comments.bodyEn: How was that a homerun
comments.bodyJa: なんでこれがホームランになるんだよ

comments.author: Koronesukiii
comments.bodyEn: If you think about it, homeruns really are just oversized bloopers.
comments.bodyJa: よく考えたらホームランって、デカいポテンヒットなんだよな

comments.author: okay_throwaway_today
comments.bodyEn: Maybe the real bloopruns were the friends we made along the way
comments.bodyJa: 本当のポテンホームランは、その道中で出会った仲間たちだったのかもしれない

comments.author: dawgystyle
comments.bodyEn: Bloop homer
comments.bodyJa: ポテンホームラン

comments.author: holdenfords
comments.bodyEn: he barely hit the ball that's crazy
comments.bodyJa: ほとんど当たってないのにこれだぞ、おかしいだろ

comments.author: cmgriffith_
comments.bodyEn: Ohtani turned on that Sweeper quickly (107 exit velocity). He has such fast hands
comments.bodyJa: あのスイーパーを一瞬で引っ張ってる（打球速度107マイル）。手の返しが速すぎる

comments.author: Psychological_Fly627
comments.bodyEn: Make up for the one that got robbed yesterday lol
comments.bodyJa: 昨日もぎ取られた分の埋め合わせだな笑

comments.author: GodOD400
comments.bodyEn: He did it last night too and went oppo. He just squares balls on any swing I guess lol
comments.bodyJa: 昨夜も逆方向に打ってたしな。どんなスイングでも芯で捉えてくるわ笑

comments.author: 2Bid
comments.bodyEn: Holy shit I legit thought that was just gonna be a single LMAO. If his 29/30 homer yesterday didn't get robbed, he'd be like .024 away from 1.000 OPS again, forgot he got robbed of a double by a basket catch as well
comments.bodyJa: マジでただのシングルヒットだと思ったわ大爆笑。昨日の29号/30号がもぎ取られてなければ、またOPS1.000まで.024ってとこだったぞ。バスケットキャッチで二塁打も奪われてたの忘れてた

comments.author: Brandonteng99
comments.bodyEn: And the robbery and the basket catch. Should've had 3 HR 4 hit game yday
comments.bodyJa: ホームラン強奪とバスケットキャッチがなければ、昨日は3本塁打4安打の試合だったわ

comments.author: MahomestoHel-aire
comments.bodyEn: Trying to get that OPS above his ERA.
comments.bodyJa: OPSを防御率より上にしようとしてるな

comments.author: Traditional_Rate7302
comments.bodyEn: At this rate he might actually do it
comments.bodyJa: このペースなら本当にやりかねん

comments.author: dwpea66
comments.bodyEn: His ERA is 1.06. His OPS in 2023 was 1.066. definitely possible lol
comments.bodyJa: 防御率1.06。2023年のOPSが1.066。普通にいけるわ笑

comments.author: sfg-1
comments.bodyEn: So the Dodgers were just sitting him after he pitches for no reason huh
comments.bodyJa: つまりドジャースは登板後に意味もなく休ませてたってことか

comments.author: Mew_111
comments.bodyEn: This hot hitting streak really got started after they gave him those days off.
comments.bodyJa: この打撃絶好調、休養日をもらってから始まってるんだよな

comments.author: catashake
comments.bodyEn: Tbf, his numbers the day after pitching last season were pretty rough. Edit: And now he left the game with left knee inflammation... Maybe the Dodgers were onto something by resting him.
comments.bodyJa: まあ公平に言うと、去年も登板翌日の成績はかなり悪かったからな。追記: そして今、左ヒザの炎症で途中交代した…休ませてたドジャースは何か掴んでたのかもな

comments.author: CruelRuin
comments.bodyEn: 3-0 to HR life comes at you fast
comments.bodyJa: 3ボール0ストライクからホームラン、人生は一瞬だな

comments.author: weguccino
comments.bodyEn: shohei was 100% just going to take the walk but keller started throwing strikes lol
comments.bodyJa: 翔平は完全に四球狙いだったのに、ケラーがストライク投げ始めちゃったんよ笑

comments.author: yli16
comments.bodyEn: Junetani has arrived.
comments.bodyJa: ジューンタニ（6月の大谷）、降臨。

comments.author: Biffdickburg
comments.bodyEn: Overrated ammiright boys?
comments.bodyJa: 過大評価だよな、みんな？

comments.author: Traditional_Rate7302
comments.bodyEn: This guy's pretty overrated tbh /S
comments.bodyJa: 正直こいつかなり過大評価だわ（皮肉）

comments.author: HeavensRoyalty
comments.bodyEn: Every game, every at bat, every swing and every pitch, we're watching history. Shohei Ohtani.
comments.bodyJa: 毎試合、毎打席、毎スイング、毎投球、俺たちは歴史を見てるんだ。大谷翔平。

comments.author: Ricemobile
comments.bodyEn: 1 billion, yet, it's the cheapest contract in the league. There's not enough money in baseball to pay this man what he's worth.
comments.bodyJa: 10億ドル、それでもリーグで一番割安な契約。この男の価値に見合う金額は、野球界にはもう存在しない。
